svg.title: Vintage Ornate Storybook Back Cover
svg.desc: A warm antique back cover for a literary fantasy storybook with parchment tones, gold filigree borders, decorative inlays, and a central blurb panel on aged parchment

g.text: THE CHRONICLES OF THE GOLDEN MERIDIAN
"Magnificent. A masterwork of literary imagination and wonder."
In the age when maps still held mysteries,
and ink still tasted of forgotten oaths —
The cartographer Elara Voss has charted every kingdom in
the known world — except the one her mother died to erase.
When a sealed atlas arrives at her door bearing her own
handwriting — dated thirty years hence — she must choose
between the life she has built and the truth she was never
Beyond the Meridian, the old rules no longer apply. The roads
rewrite themselves. The forests remember. And something
older than language has been waiting — patiently, hungrily —
for a mapmaker who dares to draw its name.
Also: The Amber Codex, Vol. I
Printed in England on sustainably sourced laid paper
